description: Time-Tapping Test - Motor timing task measuring temporal entrainment and dual-task performance

parameters.name: taprates
parameters.description: Target tap rates in milliseconds. Specify as JSON list (e.g., [333,666,1000]) for specific rates (one trial per rate), or "random" to sample numtrials times from mintaptime to maxtaptime range.

parameters.name: numtrials
parameters.description: Number of trials when taprates is 'random'. Ignored when taprates is a list (number of trials = length of list).

parameters.name: trialtime
parameters.description: Duration of each trial in seconds (default: 180 = 3 minutes).

parameters.name: mintaptime
parameters.description: Minimum (fastest) inter-tap interval in milliseconds (used when taprates='random'). Should not be less than ~250ms (typical maximum keyboard tapping speed).

parameters.name: maxtaptime
parameters.description: Maximum (slowest) inter-tap interval in milliseconds (used when taprates='random').

parameters.name: trainingflashes
parameters.description: Duration of training period in seconds. During this time, a flashing cross appears at the target tap rate to help participants entrain to the rhythm.

parameters.name: responsemode
parameters.description: Response mode: spacebar (keyboard), leftclick (mouse click), touchscreen (touch), clicktarget (click target box), userselect (custom key)
